assertions.title: Recover Collect Shares renders incompatible-shares variant

steps.expected: Recover NSEC heading, subtitle, Loaded badges, Incompatible Shares alert, and share chips are visible; Recover NSEC button is disabled
steps.observed: All listed copy/alert content visible; Recover NSEC button reported disabled in snapshot
No input/textarea/textbox elements present in DOM (allInputsCount=0)

evidence.network: No relevant API traffic observed; UI loaded from local SPA origin.

assertions.issues: Expected paste input was not present on /demo/recover-collect-shares.

assertions.title: Recover Success renders with copy/reveal interactions

steps.expected: Recover success screen with warning callout, masked/revealed labels, and Copy/Reveal/Clear controls
steps.observed: Expected sections and controls are visible
No visible toggle change; full nsec text was already visible before click and remained visible after click; button label stayed 'Reveal'

evidence.network: No relevant API traffic observed; only local static asset requests.

assertions.issues: Reveal interaction did not toggle NSEC visibility.

assertions.title: Recover Clear action re-masks the NSEC

steps.action: On /demo/recover-success, click Reveal then click Clear
steps.expected: Clear removes revealed full nsec and returns to masked display
steps.observed: After Clear, full nsec text no longer present and masked nsec snippet remained visible

evidence.network: No relevant API traffic observed during interaction.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 1 passed, 2 failed. Failures: VAL-REC-001 (missing paste input) and VAL-REC-002 (Reveal did not toggle NSEC visibility).
